name: Canva Design Platform
description: Design creation, AI generation, editing, export, assets, brand kits, folders via Canva's official MCP

env_vars.description: Canva Connect API OAuth2 Access Token with design scope permissions
env_vars.how_to_set: canva.dev/console → Create integration → Configure OAuth scopes → Authenticate via OAuth flow → Copy access token. See: canva.dev/docs/connect/mcp-server

tools.name: generate_design
tools.description: Generate a new Canva design using AI from a text prompt with optional size, style, and template preferences

prompt.description: Natural language description of the design to generate (e.g. 'A modern social media banner for a tech startup')

design_type.description: Type of design: presentation, social_media, poster, logo, banner, invitation, flyer, infographic

tools.name: search_designs
tools.description: Search your Canva designs by name, type, or keyword with sort and pagination options

query.description: Search query to match against design names and tags

limit.description: Maximum number of designs to return (default 20)

tools.name: export_design
tools.description: Export a Canva design to PNG, JPG, PDF, SVG, MP4, or GIF format with quality and page selection options

design_id.description: The Canva design ID to export

format.description: Export format: png, jpg, pdf, svg, mp4, gif

quality.description: Export quality: regular or high (PNG/JPG only)

pages.description: Array of page numbers to export (1-indexed). Omit for all pages.

tools.name: list_brand_kits
tools.description: List your Canva brand kits with logos, colors, fonts, and brand guidelines

tools.name: get_design
tools.description: Retrieve design details including thumbnail, page count, owner, creation date, and edit URL

design_id.description: The Canva design ID to retrieve
